Off Calendar Sep-27-2007 Continued To Nov-20-07 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Minor'S Compromise.
Off Calendar Aug-17-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Dave Davenport.
Adriana Abreu, Esq. for Petitioner: Ronee Lewis, present as Guardian ad litem for: Jamari Robonson, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees $1,250.00
Costs $1,053.59
A net balance of $2,696.41 to be deposited into a blocked account, no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
In open court, Petitioner's request for balance of the settlement to be distributed to the minor is DENIED.
Petitioner to determine which Bank Account to be used for the blocked account, counsel to prepare the Orders and submit to Dept. 218 for approval.

Aug. 17, 2007
Purposed Orders rec'd in court, granted and signed by Comm. Kaplan.
See scanned doc. for details.

Minor'S Compromise.
Off Calendar Jul-26-2007 Continued To Aug-09-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
